title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Amara Raja Batteries Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Amara Raja Batteries Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amara Raja Batteries Global Group:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries Global Group!
